name: alert-appreg-cert-per-item
description: Fires one alert per App Registration certificate expiring in exactly 30 days. Each unique application triggers a separate alert with the app name, credential details, and days remaining in the email subject. Only fires once per credential at the 30-day mark.
query:
AppRegistrationCredentialExpiry_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by ApplicationId, CredentialKeyId
| where CredentialType == 'Certificate' and ObjectType == 'AppRegistration' and DaysToExpiry == 30
| project ApplicationDisplayName, ApplicationId, CredentialDisplayName, CredentialKeyId, DaysToExpiry, EndDateUtc, ExpiryBand, ObjectType, CredentialType
